warnings: W1: runtime factor probe is partially self-referential (surrogate_fdr.factor_id is tool-written from the lock-pinned record); integrity guarantee is structural (stage-all declared factors + fail-closed ambiguity), probe pins only the runtime constructor

W2: tool derives the under-test family from the unique non-support lock family and never cross-checks the sspec's explicit dataset_scope.family; a future sspec whose true family is in the hardcoded support set could be silently mis-resolved (six committed sspecs pinned by test)
W3: six-rerun-sspec factor-resolution test is skip-gated on a local registry it does not use; it silently skips in CI (passed locally during review) — remove the gate so CI pins the factor sets

W4: Parquet hash verification compares registry hash to the sidecar manifest, not a recomputation over parquet rows; parquet-swapped-without-manifest passes vacuously (fver row filter and record-lock assertions are independent nets for the cross-factor clobber class); recommend recomputing compute_value_content_hash over loaded rows
W5: pre-fix namespaces cannot be rescored under the new multi-spec seed grid (fail closed via missing-seed error rows) — acceptable, those runs are the invalid wrong-factor runs
